topic: Map every LIVE touchpoint for deprecating mcp-coco-index + system-rerank-sidecar and decoupling system-code-graph from CocoIndex, into a classified resource map + dependency-ordered deprecation phase DAG.

novelty: Mapped 30+ LIVE touchpoints across 3 target skills, 3 runtime configs, commands, agents, and global docs. Identified DELETE class for mcp-coco-index and system-rerank-sidecar skill folders, EDIT-decouple for system-code-graph CCC integration, and EDIT-remove-ref for 20+ config/documentation files. Opened RQ2-RQ5 threads for deeper dependency tracing.

Confirmed mk-spec-memory as the only non-coco consumer of system-rerank-sidecar, documented fallback to positional scoring in cross-encoder.ts:319-330, mapped ccc_* tool registration points for RQ3 decoupling work.

Mapped precise edit-set for decoupling system-code-graph from CocoIndex: 32 file mutations across tool-schemas, handlers, SKILL.md, query-intent-classifier, tests, and boundary. Confirmed 11→8 tool reduction (remove ccc_status/ccc_reindex/ccc_feedback), defined verify gate with structural test suites.

Mapped 33 semantic-search routes to CocoIndex across AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, context agent, deep-review agent, deep commands, and code-graph docs. Recommended HYBRID policy (Grep + code-graph structural) over DROP or memory_search repoint, with 4-phase doc rewrite plan.

Enumerated 97 config + mirror touchpoints with exact JSON/TOML key paths across 4 runtimes, identified x4 multiplier pattern for agent/command edits, mapped rerank-sidecar env var locations in opencode.json _NOTE_8/_NOTE_9 and runtime configs.

Catalogued 28 deletion-completeness items: venvs, bundled scripts (5 coco + 8 sidecar), runtime artifacts (daemon sockets/pids, index dirs, telemetry, port bindings), HuggingFace model cache (shared-optional), git hooks (session-start.sh, orphan-mcp-sweeper.sh), dependency manifests (pyproject.toml), and skill folder deletions. Confirmed no cross-skill imports beyond already-mapped ensure-rerank-sidecar.cjs.

focus: RQ6 deprecation phase DAG + ordering + risk
novelty: Synthesized dependency-ordered deprecation phase DAG from 6 prior iterations: 8 phases (decouple-code-graph, remove-memory-rerank-path, remove-rerank-sidecar-skill, remove-coco-index-skill, runtime-configs-4runtime-mirror, docs-readme-search-routing, runtime-artifacts-cleanup) with DECOUPLE-BEFORE-DELETE hard constraint, per-phase verify gates, rollback points, and risk register.

Identified 16 net-new touchpoints in skill graph-metadata.json files (6 files), compiled skill-graph.json, and sk-code/sk-doc template/reference files (8 files). Reconciled phase DAG file counts: total ~247 files (up from ~231), distributed across phases 002 (+2), 006 (+7), 007 (+8). No corrections needed to prior inventory.

Confirmed memory's only sidecar tie is local cross-encoder provider + ensure helper (no other runtime path), confirmed code-graph's only coco tie is ccc_* tools + classifier routing (no hidden runtime dependency). Identified 9 dynamic runtime touchpoints (imports, HTTP endpoints, env checks) missed by static grep. Documented skill-graph recompile requirement after graph-metadata edge removal.

Consolidated all findings from iterations 001-009 into resource-map skeleton with 7 sections (executive summary, touchpoint inventory by phase, 2 key decisions, phase DAG, risk register, negative knowledge, deletion checklist). Verified all 7 RQs MET with evidence citations. Finalized 12 open uncertainties for deepseek adversarial closers (feature catalog CCC files, HuggingFace cache policy, runtime verification procedures, DAG ordering safety, touchpoint class mis-assignment, positional fallback degradation, missed runtime consumers). Confirmed 8-phase DAG count and ordering remain valid.

Found 38 net-new LIVE touchpoints missed by prior iterations: doctor route manifest coco entry in _routes.yaml (critical), ~40 YAML workflow assets hardcoding mcp__cocoindex_code__search (critical for loop executors), launcher env pass-throughs (COCOINDEX_BIN_PATH, RERANK_SIDECAR_PORT), orphan sweeper port 8765 probes, feature catalog CCC file classification, and gemini TOML command mirrors. Challenged iteration-009 false claim of no localhost:8765 probes. Identified 3 critical DAG ordering gaps: /doctor cocoindex route zombie (002-006 window), YAML asset loop executor breakage, and dead env pass-through. Validated memory cross-encoder loss is safe for default path. HYBRID policy judged partially sound with YAML asset coverage gap.

Enumerated 27 YAML assets (not ~40) with exact file:line; found 6 pass-1 misses (doctor_mcp_install/debug/update yamls, Gemini toml, scripts readme L78, _routes L73); corrected phase DAG with expanded Phase 002 and 007 scopes; issued COMPLETE+CORRECT verdict with 4 residual risks
